title: The Unsolved Mystery of the S.S. Ourang Medan

scenes.text: All aboard, but not a soul was left alive.
This eerie event occurred in the waters of Indonesia.
In 1947, a signal reported crew in distress, but all were found dead.
The cause of death remains a mystery.
scenes.label: UNEXPLAINED DEATHS

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Indonesian Waters, Indonesia - 1947. An enigmatic distress signal led rescuers to a ghost ship where the entire crew was found dead. The cause remains unexplained. Follow for daily cold cases!
